rationale: Simplified the gateway initiation_mode assignment in moonmind/rag/service.py without changing the fallback behavior.
Review summary only; the underlying actionable suggestion is tracked as discussion comment 3137257910.

Automated review wrapper only; actionable feedback is captured by the individual review comments already classified above.
